title: Missing boards from Gantt widget on Dashboard
excerpt: I’ve connected and selected 4 boards to show up in the Gantt widget I added to my dashboard. However, I’m only seeing 2 of the 4 boards actually show up. Any ideas on what I may be doing wrong here?

posts.author: VpattersonPropwic (Vickie Patterson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve connected and selected 4 boards to show up in the Gantt widget I added to my dashboard. However, I’m only seeing 2 of the 4 boards actually show up. Any ideas on what I may be doing wrong here?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @VpattersonPropwic ,

Have you checked the Gantt chart settings? Some common culprits to why certain boards may not be showing up could be the wrong date column was selected by default in the “Choose Timeline Dates” section or groups may be hidden in the “Choose” groups section

Another culprit for boards not showing up is if you used a date column on those boards instead of a timeline column. You can fix this by copying the dates to a timeline column which still allows you to have a date range of just 1 day.

Hope one of these solutions helps, if not let us know and we can continue troubleshooting.
